notes: Added useRouter, Button, createTab, toastError imports. Added creating state and handleCreateJourneyTab callback inside CompareView. Added a Button to the empty state that appears when journeyTab === null (covers both hasNeither and processTab-only cases). Button calls createTab({ workspace_id, name: 'Journey', canvas_type: 'journey' }) then navigates to /w/${workspaceId}/${newTab.id} on success. Shows loading state via Button's loading prop. On error, shows toastError and resets loading state.
